title: image_url not entity-decoded; & in OG image URLs breaks image fetch
description: In src/cards.rs, title/description/provider_name/author_name are passed through decode_html_entities(), but image_url (line 124-128) is not. Since we parse HTML with regex (not a DOM parser), HTML entities in attribute values are not automatically decoded. A common pattern is: <meta property="og:image" content="https://cdn.example.com/img?w=600&h=400">. The captured value will contain literal '&' instead of '&', producing a broken image URL. Fix: apply decode_html_entities() to image_url (and arguably to the url field from og:url if ever used).
